title: P2: Fix Debug.WriteLine silent exception swallowing in Release builds
description: Debug.WriteLine in ActionQueue.cs (catch block for failed stopCallback) and HtnPlanner.ParseLlmActions (static method) silently drops exceptions in Release builds. Fix: Convert ParseLlmActions to instance method so _logger is accessible. Inject ILogger<ActionQueue> into ActionQueue constructor, or make the swallow explicit with a comment.
